name: Sterilized Bandage
notes: Always sterilize bandages before applying in the field to prevent wound infection. Sterilized bandages heal faster than plain ones.

name: Ripped Sheets
notes: Produces 4 Rags from one sheet. Sheets found in bedrooms and linen cupboards. Rags are used as emergency bandages, torch fuel, and in crafting.

name: Herbal Poultice
notes: Reduces infection chance and speeds wound healing. Plantain is foraged in grassy areas and roadsides. A good supplement when medical supplies run low.

name: Improvised Splint
notes: Stabilises fractures. Without treatment, fractures cause ongoing pain and reduce action effectiveness. Rest is required for full recovery even with a splint.

name: Disinfected Rag
notes: Emergency alternative to sterilized bandages when disinfectant spray is unavailable. Whiskey is found in bars, liquor stores, and kitchens.
